About Me Professional Personal 3D Modeling UI/UX Game Design

About me

I am young game developer from New York City, passionate about and interested in almost all facets of the artform. I am currently in my 3rd year of undergrad at Clark University’s Becker School of Technology & Design, majoring in Interactive Media & Game Development, and also a minor in Francophone Studies & French. Most of my professional experience is in 3D modeling and texturing, but I have skills in programming, gameplay design, and UI/UX.

Please enjoy and explore!
